text:
The comptroller shall:

(1) administer, collect, and enforce a tax imposed under this chapter; and

(2) remit to a district the tax collected on the district’s property.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.358 — Duty of Comptroller

The comptroller shall:

    (1) administer, collect, and enforce a tax imposed under this chapter; and

    (2) remit to a district the tax collected on the district’s property.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: administer, collect, and enforce a tax imposed under this chapter; and
remit to a district the tax collected on the district’s property.
